001package edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.viewmodel;
002
003import android.app.Activity;
004import android.util.Log;
005import androidx.annotation.NonNull;
006import androidx.lifecycle.LiveData;
007import androidx.lifecycle.MutableLiveData;
008import androidx.lifecycle.ViewModel;
009import com.google.android.libraries.identity.googleid.GoogleIdTokenCredential;
010import dagger.hilt.android.lifecycle.HiltViewModel;
011import edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.service.respository.GoogleAuthRepository;
012import javax.inject.Inject;
013
014/**
015 * ViewModel for handling Google Sign-In authentication using GoogleAuthRepository.
016 */
017@HiltViewModel
018public class LoginViewModel extends ViewModel {
019
020  private static final String TAG = LoginViewModel.class.getSimpleName();
021
022  private final MutableLiveData<AuthenticationState> authenticationState;
023  private final GoogleAuthRepository authRepository;
024
025  @Inject
026  public LoginViewModel(@NonNull GoogleAuthRepository authRepository) {
027    this.authRepository = authRepository;
028    this.authenticationState = new MutableLiveData<>(AuthenticationState.UNAUTHENTICATED);
029  }
030
031  public LiveData<AuthenticationState> getAuthenticationState() {
032    return authenticationState;
033  }
034
035  /**
036   * Initiates Google Sign-In flow using GoogleAuthRepository.
037   * First attempts quick sign-in (filtered by authorized accounts).
038   * If that fails, falls back to full sign-in flow.
039   *
040   * @param activity The activity context required for credential flow.
041   */
042  public void signIn(@NonNull Activity activity) {
043    authRepository.signInQuickly(activity)
044        .whenComplete((credential, throwable) -> {
045          if (throwable != null) {
046            Log.d(TAG, "Quick sign-in failed, attempting full sign-in");
047            attemptFullSignIn(activity);
048          } else {
049            handleSignInSuccess(credential);
050          }
051        });
052  }
053
054  public void signOut() {
055    authenticationState.postValue(AuthenticationState.UNAUTHENTICATED);
056    authRepository.signOut()
057        .whenComplete((result, throwable) -> {
058          if (throwable != null) {
059            Log.e(TAG, "Sign-out failed", throwable);
060            authenticationState.postValue(AuthenticationState.ERROR);
061          } else {
062            Log.d(TAG, "Sign-out successful");
063            authenticationState.postValue(AuthenticationState.UNAUTHENTICATED);
064          }
065        });
066  }
067
068  private void attemptFullSignIn(@NonNull Activity activity) {
069    authRepository.signIn(activity)
070        .whenComplete((credential, throwable) -> {
071          if (throwable != null) {
072            handleSignInError(throwable);
073          } else {
074            handleSignInSuccess(credential);
075          }
076        });
077  }
078
079  private void handleSignInSuccess(GoogleIdTokenCredential credential) {
080    String displayName = credential.getDisplayName();
081    String email = credential.getId();
082    Log.d(TAG, "Sign-in successful: " + displayName + " (" + email + ")");
083    authenticationState.postValue(AuthenticationState.AUTHENTICATED);
084  }
085
086  private void handleSignInError(Throwable throwable) {
087    if (throwable instanceof GoogleAuthRepository.SignInRequiredException) {
088      Log.e(TAG, "Sign-in required", throwable);
089    } else {
090      Log.e(TAG, "Sign-in failed", throwable);
091    }
092    authenticationState.postValue(AuthenticationState.ERROR);
093  }
094
095  public enum AuthenticationState {
096    UNAUTHENTICATED,
097    AUTHENTICATED,
098    ERROR
099  }
100}
